citation: VA M26-7 Chapter 8 Table — Purchase, first use, >=10% down
comment: Hand-calc: $400,000 loan, 10% down (in >=10 band, lower bound INCLUSIVE), first VA use → first_use_pct=0.0125. Fee = $400,000 × 0.0125 = $5,000.00. Boundary test: down_payment_pct=0.10 must land in the >=10 band, NOT the 5..<10 band.
